'''Chala Venan''' was an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] who planned to sabotage the wedding of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] with his compatriots, [[Banner Sumptor]], [[Chik Apla]], [[Iry Danta]], [[Anlys Takkar]], and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derran Takkar]].
